## Checklist

- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, ...).
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run test` pass.
- [ ] `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, and `cargo test` pass (if backend changed).
- [ ] I updated documentation (README / CHANGELOG / ADR) where relevant.
- [ ] I respected Clean Architecture boundaries.
